The '''''Ansta''''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] employed by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. The ''Ansta'' was part of the blockade of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] by the Alliance's [[Third Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Third]] and [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleets]]. It was assigned to the Fifth Fleet, under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cheb]].

{{Ship-stub}}
